ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code only — not a postal address.
Date of birth — used to enforce 16+ minimum age at signup.
Not collected — we do not record activities or biometrics.
Group chat threads scoped to a single ride.

Not in this build (PTT is Premium-only and not shipping).
Write-only access to add a ride; we do not read or store the user's calendar.
Used by Discover to sort public rides by distance. Coordinates not persisted server-side.
Used by the meeting-point picker and Discover. Coordinates not persisted server-side.
Anonymous app-usage events via Firebase Analytics (sign-up; sign-in; ride created; RSVP; screen view). No Cognito user ID; name; or email passed to Firebase.
Firebase-generated anonymous instance ID. Not linked to user account on our side.
Sentry — anonymised stack traces. No request bodies; no user-identifying details attached.
